name: /incident appends a back-reference entry to FAILURE-LOG.md linking the incident directory per F-5 cross-reference
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/incident.sh" 'rate-limit breach' --date 2026-05-25 2>/dev/null && grep -q 'incidents/2026-05-25-001/' FAILURE-LOG.md && echo linked 1>&2
